description: Bring out the Christmas cheer in these adorable novelty unisex t-shirts from Baby Town by Metzuyan, which are available in sizes 3-24 months. Baby will love pointing out the cute Christmas characters on these tees. These will be perfect for getting your child excited for Christmas (not that they need much help!). The high quality 100% cotton fabric of these t-shirts allows your baby's skin to breathe naturally as well as being lovely and soft making Christmas extra comfy! Baby can wear these t-shirts all December long, try wearing them for Christmas cuddles, for family party's or for Christmas day itself!
